text: I find myself in a space both clinical and creative—a corridor gives way to a room that buzzes with innovation. The stark wiring, glass panels, and safety equipment in the entry are juxtaposed with the bold, vibrant wall of the exhibit inside. The "R+D" theme invites reflection on progress and coexistence with technology. I sense curiosity and anticipation, feeling like an observer on the verge of discovery. Here, I am reminded that knowledge and creativity are boundless, and I am eager to see where this space leads me.
